title: picramnia sellowii
intro: Picramnia sellowii, also known as Piquiá or Piquia, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Picramniaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Picramnia sellowii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Picramnia sellowii can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
